m:page.title: Auto nano profiler config New edit

IProfiler to retrieve SQL info"},"args":{}}},"labelFor":{"$type":"DerivedUniqueIdProperty","widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.radioButtons9"},"width":3,"orientation":"horizontal","hasError":{"$type":"ValidationProperty","inputWidgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.radioButtons9"}}},{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.layoutGrid1","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"mx-name-layoutGrid1 mx-layoutgrid mx-layoutgrid-fluid container-fluid","content":[{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.layoutGrid1$row0","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"row","content":[{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.layoutGrid1$row0$column0","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"col-lg-3 col-md col","content":null}},{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.layoutGrid1$row0$column1","widget":"Div","props":{"class":"col-lg-9 col-md col","content":[{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.text1","widget":"Text","props":{"class":"mx-name-text1","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"This is a beta feature.\r\nWhen enabled this, NanoProfiler uses Core.registerProfiler(IProfiler) to retrieve SQL information. That prevents SQL executed by other threads from being mixed into the profile results. However, due to the timing discrepancy, SQL is often not counted to the correct Action or Microflow."},"args":{}}},"renderMode":"span"}}]}}]}}]}}],"hideFooter":false,"footer":[{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton1","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton1","class":"mx-name-actionButton1","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-success","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Save"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"saveChanges","argMap":{"$object":{"widget":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.dataView1","source":"object"}},"config":{"operationId":"sQH/eTtpQlCyhU2ciOAaMg","closePage":true},"disabledDuringExecution":true},"abortOnServerValidation":true}}},{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton3$visibility","widget":"ConditionalVisibilityWrapper","props":{"visible":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"function","name":"_hasSomeRole","parameters":[{"type":"literal","value":"Administrator"}]},"args":{}}},"contents":[{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton3","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton3","class":"mx-name-actionButton3","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Regexp Validator"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"openPage","argMap":{"param$AutoNanoProfilerConfig":{"widget":"$AutoNanoProfilerConfig","source":"object"}},"config":{"name":"NanoProfiler/RegexpMatchValidatorPage.page.xml","location":"modal","resizable":true,"allowedRoles":["Administrator"]},"disabledDuringExecution":true},"abortOnServerValidation":true}}}]}},{"$widgetId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton2","widget":"ActionButton","props":{"buttonId":"49.NanoProfiler.AutoNanoProfilerConfig_NewEdit.actionButton2","class":"mx-name-actionButton2","renderType":"button","buttonClass":"btn-default","caption":{"$type":"ExpressionProperty","expression":{"expr":{"type":"literal","value":"Cancel"},"args":{}}},"tooltip":{"$type":"TextProperty","value":""},"action":{"$type":"ActionProperty","action":{"type":"cancelChanges","argMap":{},"config":{"operationId":"ocr+9EkoNlGRBpyGIRgPiw","closePage":true},"disabledDuringExecution":true},"abortOnServerValidation":true}}}]}}],"localVariableWidget":null,"localVariables":[],"selections":[]
